{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Head of the Alchemist’s Guild
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Head of the Alchemist’s Guild]] can produce canisters of alchemical solutions.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Head of the [[Alchemist's Guild]] wears glasses and sits on a stool.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
